overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a third-person perspective following a character through a futuristic urban environment. The clip opens with a view of a flying vehicle passing overhead, then transitions to walking along a covered pedestrian walkway beneath massive elevated highways, eventually crossing an intersection in a dense cyberpunk cityscape featuring industrial architecture, digital floor advertisements, and satellite arrays.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated platform overlook with satellite array

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from right to left across the sky

agents.ego_description: standing still looking up at the flying vehicle passing overhead

notable_agents.action: futuristic aerial vehicle flying overhead with glowing thrusters

entered.detail: futuristic aerial vehicle with illuminated thrusters flying overhead
tall cylindrical industrial building with vertical CYBERPUNK signage
large white parabolic satellite dishes mounted on rooftop
black metal safety railing on the edge of the elevated platform

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view looking up from an elevated platform at a clear blue sky. A futuristic flying vehicle passes overhead from right to left, while a large satellite dish array and a tall industrial tower with CYBERPUNK branding are visible in the background. The camera remains relatively stationary, tracking the vehicle's movement across the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital floor advertisements

events.description: camera pans down from sky view to ground level
begins walking forward along the covered pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: panning camera down from the sky and beginning to walk along the covered pedestrian walkway following a character ahead

notable_agents.action: character in yellow plaid shirt walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: glowing digital advertisement panels embedded in the walkway floor showing various graphics
massive concrete overpass structure with steel support beams overhead
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines

segments.scene_description: The camera pans down from the sky and begins moving forward along a covered pedestrian walkway. Digital advertisements glow on the floor to the left, while massive elevated highway structures loom ahead. The camera follows a character in a yellow plaid shirt walking along the path, with industrial buildings and power lines visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway under elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: entering area with increased pedestrian traffic and crowd density
approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway following the character in yellow, passing other pedestrians moving in both directions

notable_agents.action: character in yellow plaid shirt continuing to walk ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing green light
metal framework and scaffolding on building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along the pedestrian path under the massive elevated highway structure, the scene becomes busier with moderate pedestrian traffic. The camera continues following the character in the yellow jacket as they approach an intersection. Traffic lights and construction scaffolding become visible on the right, while the overpass creates dramatic shadows across the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection under elevated highway with industrial zone

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection with crosswalk
crossing the street at the marked crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk while following the crowd, then continuing along the sidewalk next to industrial buildings

notable_agents.action: character in white tank top and cap walking alongside and then ahead

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
large factory-like structure with smokestack emitting white steam

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway into a wide-open intersection, crossing the street at a marked crosswalk. The environment shifts to a more industrial zone with a large building featuring a smokestack on the left. After crossing, the character continues walking along a path adjacent to what appears to be train tracks or industrial transport infrastructure, remaining under the shadow of the elevated highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a wide view of the futuristic skyline and descends into the dense, industrial depths of a cyberpunk city. It begins by looking up at a clear blue sky as a flying vehicle glides past a massive satellite array and a branded industrial tower. The camera then pans down to follow a character in a yellow plaid shirt moving along a covered pedestrian walkway, where glowing digital floor advertisements lead toward looming elevated highway structures. As the character progresses, the scene becomes busier with pedestrian traffic and dramatic shadows cast by the overpass, passing by construction scaffolding and traffic lights. Finally, the camera follows the character out of the covered path and across a wide intersection into an industrial zone, moving past a large smokestack and along transport infrastructure beneath the persistent shadow of the highway.
